active.currentStep: UX TRACK → LOW-FI WIREFRAMES (v1 screen set DONE — 7 screens; awaiting user review before resuming foundation rendering + components). Done earlier: 3 personas; ALL 9 user-flows; ~34 pain points; 33 user stories; STORY MAP map-agentx-control-plane-v1 (10-step backbone, 2 slices: v1 walking skeleton=18 stories, v1.1+ depth=15) → product/.pencil-ux.json + product/ux/{personas,journeys,story-maps}/*.md (story-map markdown verified on disk). Screen inventory: Intake, Compose, Specs/Feature-Kits (NEW), SubmitJob, Jobs, Sessions, Proposals, Catalog, Benchmarks/BenchmarkRun, NavShell. Cross-cutting widgets: flow-graph (tag=flow-graph-widget), acceptance-criteria checklist (tag=checklist-widget). Provenance spine: spec-kit version ↔ job ↔ produced feature. NOTE: pain-point .addressedBy backrefs NOT written (forward refs present). PENCIL: reconnected 2026-05-12. WIREFRAME FILE: product/design/wireframes/control-plane-v1.pen (per user — wireframes live in agentx-platform under product/design/, NOT agentx-studio; bootstrapped by copying agentx-studio/.agentx/wireframes/entry.pen ONLY for its design tokens — the `mode` dark/light theme + ~20 color tokens [$bg-*, $accent*, $text-*, $status-*, $border*] + JetBrains Mono / Inter. The two 'Entry Screen' frames that came along in that copy were removed — per user, the entry/dashboard screen is a separate prior artifact that still lives in agentx-studio/.agentx/wireframes/entry.pen and is NOT part of this v1 set; do not re-add it). control-plane-v1.pen now holds the v1 wireframes (left→right on canvas): 'Entry Screen — Dark' (lmqnz — NEW, simple launcher per user: topbar = [☰ hamburger][● AgentX Studio logo] left, profile right; a HIDDEN NAV DRAWER (absolute-positioned left overlay, 248px, shown OPEN on the Entry screen as the demo — toggled by ☰, hidden by default; the ☰ hamburger is in the topbar Toolbar-Left of ALL 8 screens, before the logo): MENU + ✕, then Home[selected] · Products · Jobs · Benchmarks · —CATALOG— · Agents · Skills · Flows, each w/ a Material Symbol icon; centered column behind it = greeting 'How can we help you today?' + sub, a Job Input Card: big textarea + attachments row [📎 file chip / 🔗 url chip / dashed '+ Add context — files or URLs' button] + bottom row [product selector 'for: SkoolScout Platform ▾' | 'Start job →'] — nothing below the card (clean launcher; jobs live in the nav drawer / Jobs screen)]. This is the front door to W2 — type intent + attach context → Start job → coordinator routes or launches Compose. The OLD agentx-studio portfolio-dashboard 'entry' screen is unrelated and stays in agentx-studio/.agentx/wireframes/entry.pen). Then the 7 backbone screens: 'Compose Screen — Dark' (t67st — flows panel + flow-coverage matrix + flow-graph node chain + validation strip; backbone step 2 / journey-ppe-author-flow / roadmap W3), 'Confirm Job Screen — Dark' (C8SxM, was 'Submit Job' — refactored per user into a CONFIRMATION screen for the Entry screen: after 'Start job' on Entry you land here. No sidebar (centered ~720px column). Topbar = ☰ + crumb 'Confirm & start'. Main = title 'Confirm & start' + 'review what agentx will do, then confirm — or go back to edit'; 'WHAT YOU ASKED · paraphrased by the coordinator · Edit ↩' card [PRIMARY = the coordinator's paraphrase of your intent+context (a fuller structured restatement, pulls in attached docs, resolves scope) — this is what gets passed as the job's input if confirmed; below it '▸ your exact words: <terse original>' for cross-check; then a Context row of the attached files/URLs chips + '+ add'. Confirm is a comprehension check (did the coordinator understand?) as much as a cost check — Edit ↩ goes back to Entry]; COORDINATOR strip [Routed → workflow X / 'Not right → Compose a new one']; RUN CONFIG card [PRODUCT (headline — 'SkoolScout Platform' + 'ⓘ N repos' chip → hover pops a floating Repos-detail card: per-repo branch + publish target, with the note 'repos aren't a primary field — the product is; download publish type ⇒ no repos at all') · WORKFLOW (v3 ▾) · WHEN ([Run now] | [Schedule…] | [Due by…] toggle — 'Schedule = run at a set time; Due by = set a deadline, the agent queues + prioritizes to land before it')] — removed per user: Mode/sandbox-real toggle + Model-overrides (unclear) + Iteration-note (covered by Entry's intent box); ESTIMATE card [4 stat cells, story-point-led — STORY POINTS ~N (sub: 'est. by <flow> · actuals avg X / M runs', accent-colored) · AVG HITL THIS FLOW ~N (sub: '~1–2 pauses per run — plan a check-in') · COST ~$ (+ range) · TIME ~min (wall-clock incl. HITL waits); note: story-point + HITL numbers are this Flow's running averages over its history, re-estimated after the coordinator routes, actuals tracked against it; tokens (in/out) + agent names mentioned in the note; a 'Due by' deadline lets the scheduler trade cost↔speed against the slack. Connects Confirm → Jobs (actuals) → Benchmarks (aggregate)]; bottom bar [← Back to edit | 'costs apply (see estimate above)' ........ Confirm & start →]. Sits on canvas right after Entry; flow = Entry (intent + context + Start job) → Confirm (review + confirm) → Run (watch). Covers roadmap W2 / backbone step 6 — the OE-kit-queue variant of submission folds into the Entry+Confirm pair for the MVP), 'Jobs Screen — Dark' (YJ0XH — jobs panel [running/awaiting-approval/completed/failed badges] + main = job_id header + Stop/Re-submit w/ effect hint + FLOW card [status'd node chain ✓done/●running/faded-pending + progress bar] + CURRENT STEP card [becomes WHY-IT-FAILED on failure] + COST/TIME card + EVENTS feed; backbone step 7 / journey-oe-watch-run / roadmap W4), 'Proposals Screen — Dark' (NNqk8 — proposals panel [needs-review/accepted/rejected→flow badges] + main = title/PR header + split body [left: PRODUCED-DIFF card w/ file tabs + colored diff lines; right: SPEC-ACCEPTANCE-CRITERIA checklist widget w/ ✓auto-pass/✓human-checked/✗auto-fail/?needs-review states, diff-anchor links] + decision bar [Reject→flow / Reject→Product / Accept & merge] + audit note + 'accept→publish-merge under GitHub App token' caption; backbone step 9 / journey-oe-validate-feature + journey-product-review-vs-spec / roadmap W5), 'Intake — Register Product — Dark' (cCWyF — products panel [active/draft] + main = IDENTITY card [name/slug/desc] then a 2-col body — LEFT: CONTEXT SOURCES card [typed list: website / external repo / openDoc spec, each w/ ✓indexed status, + an Index config row [code-full·embedder·backend] + Preview] and PRODUCT REPOS card [the repos work happens in, each w/ ✓App-installed / ⚠not-installed+Install]; RIGHT: PUBLISHING TARGETS card [radio-default + per-target access status — ● File download 'no auth·default', ○ GitHub PR ✓App-installed, ○ GitHub merge ✓App-installed, ○ Dropbox ⚠not-connected+Connect, ○ OneDrive ⚠+Connect, ○ Publish as Confluence ⚠+Connect, ○ Publish as Jira ⚠+Connect — all but download need access validation] — then activation warning '⚠ no flows yet — can activate but jobs won't run' + Save-draft/Activate bar; backbone step 1 / journey-ppe-register-product. Restructured per user: a product = name + context sources [websites/external repos/openDoc specs] + product repos + publishing targets w/ a default), 'Skills Screen — Dark' (xxxmB, was 'Catalog' — reworked per user's skillzkit taxonomy: skillzkit 'skills' = 4 kinds — workflows / tasks / tools(CLI) / integrations(REST); a workflow has many tasks w/ persistence points between them, usable inside a Flow [often triggers HITL] OR promoted here to a Flow / part of one. Left nav = 'SKILLS — KINDS' tabs [Workflows[sel] · Tasks · Tools(CLI) · Integrations(REST)] + skillzkit-upstream note; main = search bar + workflow cards [name + 'workflow · N tasks' tag + step-chain w/ persistence-point note + Enabled-pill/[Enable] + '↗ Promote to Flow' link]; backbone step 3 / story-catalog-browse-and-enable. NAV: 'Skills' stays one item in the drawer [umbrella over the 4 kinds, which are tabs inside this screen]; 'Agents' and 'Flows' are separate nav destinations. ), 'Agents Screen — Dark' (tA1Hn — left nav [AGENTS·8 + New agent + filters All/Enabled/System + 'agents = LLM executors that flow agent nodes use' note] + main = search + agent cards [name (+ 'system' tag for system agents) + description + a meta line 'accepts: <skills> · binding: <pref → fallback> · effort: <low/med/high>' + Enabled-pill/[Enable] + Edit link]; backbone step 3 / nav 'Agents'), 'Flows Screen — Dark' (X3pwV9 — left nav [FLOWS·12 + 'New (Compose)' + filters All/Work/Job-definition/Post-job + 'FlowDefs the harness runs · authored in Compose or promoted from a skillzkit workflow' note] + main = search + flow cards [name + kind-tag (work / job-definition[accent] / post-job) + meta line 'v3 · serves X · N nodes · node→chain' + provenance line ('authored in Compose' OR '↗ promoted from skillzkit workflow `name`') + ✓valid/⚠issue badge + 'Open in Compose →']; backbone step 2-ish / nav 'Flows'). 'Benchmarks Screen — Dark' (KeO2S — NEW per user; also added 'Benchmarks' to the nav drawer after Jobs [icon: leaderboard]. Left nav = BENCHMARKS·N + '+ New run' [cyan] + filters [All runs / by-suite] + 'run an agent+config (or whole flow) against a suite of N inputs · compare score/cost/latency/story-pt-error across runs · pick a winner to set as a flow's default' note. Main = title + a Runs Table Card ['RUNS — SUITE: <name> · N inputs each' + a comparison table: cols ☐|RUN|JOBS(✓/✗)|AVG SCORE|P50 TIME|STORY-PT MAE|$/JOB; rows = runs (model × config × flow), e.g. 'haiku-4-5 · default-flow ★ current default', 'opus-4-7 · default-flow' (0.94 ▲ best, $1.10 red), 'qwen-0.6b · default-flow baseline' (0.78 amber, $0.12 ▲ cheapest), 'haiku-4-5 · 2-agent-flow' (7m ▲ fastest); ▲ = best-per-column markers; checked rows highlighted; footer: tick 2 → side-by-side compare, 'Set as default' promotes a winning config onto the flow → Confirm-screen estimates update] + a 'Compare 2 selected →' header button. This is backbone step 10 (was out of v1 scope — now wireframed). Connects Confirm (estimate) ↔ Jobs (actuals) ↔ Benchmarks (aggregate)). 'Run Screen — Dark' (MQzvw — NEW per user, the post-'Start job' live-work view: topbar = ☰ + crumb 'Run · <flow> · <jobId>' + 'running · Nm Ns' pill + [Stop] + profile; body = 3 columns — LEFT (fill): ARTIFACT VIEWER [header: selected file name + meta + Diff|Content toggle; a live diff code block (red removed / green added / context); footer 'Latest snapshot — updates live as the agent edits']; MIDDLE (480px) split vertically — TOP: ARTIFACTS tree [grouped by repo/worktree → file rows w/ M/A/D/✦ change badges + diff-stats; selected row highlighted; plus an 'outputs' group for non-code artifacts]; BOTTOM: AGENT UPDATES [agent chips (done ✓ / active ●) + event stream (timestamp · agent · message) + a prominent amber HITL CARD (agent-needs-you prompt + verdict buttons + 'Add a note ↩') + a persistent STEERING INPUT footer ('Add steering for the agents…' + Send)]; RIGHT (48px): VSCODE-LIKE ACTIVITY BAR — vertical icon strip; clicking an icon de/activates that right-side panel; currently active = Artifacts (folder_open) + Agents (smart_toy) [both highlighted, both panels shown stacked], available-but-off = Steering (forum) · Events (receipt_long) · Run-config (tune) · Job-info (info, bottom). This is the proper version of backbone step 8 'Sessions'. THREE VARIANTS by artifact type, stacked vertically below 'Run Screen — Dark' on the canvas (x=4678): 'Run Screen — Dark' (MQzvw, y=-1318 — artifact = code → DIFF view, red/green lines), 'Run Screen — Markdown Artifact — Dark' (Kx3SA, y=-298 — artifact = .md → RENDERED markdown on a document surface, H1/H2/para/code-block/regulated-data-callout, w/ a Rendered|Source toggle), 'Run Screen — Mockup Artifact (canvas) — Dark' (B23fO, y=722 — artifact = .pen → CANVAS view: the agent's pencil PNG @2x export floating on a dark canvas w/ a drop shadow + a floating zoom toolbar [− 75% + · Fit · 100%] + a 'scroll=zoom · space-drag=pan' hint, w/ a Canvas|Source(.pen) toggle). All three share the right column [Artifacts tree (the selected artifact differs per variant) + Agent Updates (events + inline HITL cards + steering input)] + the right Activity Bar. So the Artifact Viewer is polymorphic: code→diff, markdown→rendered, .pen→zoomable canvas.). v1 SCREEN SET = 14 frames now: 12 distinct screens (Entry · Confirm[was SubmitJob] · Run · Compose · Jobs · Proposals · Intake · Skills · FeatureKit · Agents · Flows · Benchmarks) + 2 Run-variant frames (Markdown-artifact, Mockup-artifact-canvas) stacked under Run. Canvas top row L→R: Entry → Confirm → Run → Compose → Jobs → Proposals → Intake → Skills → FeatureKit → Agents → Flows → Benchmarks (all at y=-1318). Below Run (x=4678): the markdown variant at y=-298, the mockup-canvas variant at y=722. The ☰ hidden nav drawer + activity-bar are reusable design-system pieces. NOTE: 'Run' is the live working view; 'Jobs' is the list+status-overview; reachable both ways (Start job → Run; Jobs list → click running job → Run).), 'Feature Kit Screen — Dark' (EhJ27 — kits panel [handed-off/accepted/in-review/draft badges] + main = title/serves header + sections-completeness strip [Research/Wireframes/Feature-spec/Acceptance-criteria/Stories ✓ + 'Run generate-* flow'] + RESEARCH card [findings w/ §-cite anchors] + WIREFRAMES card [.pen thumbnails ↔ §-mapping] + FEATURE-SPEC card [§1-4, §3 flagged regulated-data FERPA/COPPA] + ACCEPTANCE-CRITERIA card [→ Proposals checklist] + Package/Hand-off bar; backbone step 4 / journey-product-spec-feature). v1 SCREEN SET COMPLETE — 7 screens (Sessions: existing basic streaming view = good-enough per story map; Benchmarks: out of v1 scope). LEFTOVER: agentx-studio/.agentx/wireframes/entry.pen is now a stale copy — delete it. NEXT: user review of the 7 screens → then resume Phase 4 foundation rendering (visual .pen renders of colors/typography/icons/imagery/logos/spaces/grids) → Phase 5 component generation in packages/design-system.

metadata.audienceRegulation: regulated (FERPA/COPPA/GDPR/CCPA) — guardian consent + stricter a11y variants pulled in downstream
metadata.notes: Monorepo path map lives in product/.pencil-brand.json meta.pathMap. User also wants low-fi wireframes (product:design:explore) and user story maps (product:ux:story-maps:build) layered in before/around Phase 10. Pencil structured work goes via the Pencil MCP, not a `pencil --tasks` runner — run commands phase-by-phase.

steps.choice: Font Awesome Pro — Sharp Solid (+Brands); iconMap + AgentX domain extensions
Pure Abstract / Icon-Led (Hero Patterns + FA Sharp + CSS; no illustration deps)

phases.name: Foundation rendering
phases.note: token-writers (motion/z-index/a11y/density/i18n → theme.css) are pure code; .pen visual renders (colors/typography/icons/imagery/logos/spaces/grids) need the Pencil MCP — checkpoint with user on cadence.
